en: The LORD called Moses and spoke to him from the tent of meeting, saying,
zh: 耶和華呼叫摩西，從會幕裡對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When any one of you brings an offering to the LORD, you shall bring your offering of livestock from the herd or from the flock.
zh: “你要告訴以色列人說：如果你們中間有人把供物獻給耶和華，就要從牛群羊群中獻家畜為供物。

en: "If his offering is a burnt offering from the herd, he shall offer a male without blemish. He shall bring it to the entrance of the tent of meeting, that he may be accepted before the LORD.
zh: 他的供物若是獻牛作燔祭，就要把一頭沒有殘疾的公牛，牽到會幕門口，就可以在耶和華面前蒙悅納。

en: He shall lay his hand on the head of the burnt offering, and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.
zh: 他要按手在燔祭牲的頭上，燔祭就蒙悅納，可以為他贖罪。

en: Then he shall kill the bull before the LORD, and Aaron's sons the priests shall bring the blood and throw the blood against the sides of the altar that is at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 他要在耶和華面前宰殺那公牛，亞倫子孫作祭司的，要奉上血，潑在會幕門口祭壇的四周。

en: Then he shall flay the burnt offering and cut it into pieces,
zh: 那人要剝去燔祭牲的皮，把燔祭牲切成塊子。

en: and the sons of Aaron the priest shall put fire on the altar and arrange wood on the fire.
zh: 亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把炭火放在祭壇上，把柴排列在火上；

en: And Aaron's sons the priests shall arrange the pieces, the head, and the fat, on the wood that is on the fire on the altar;
zh: 亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把肉塊和頭，以及脂肪，排列在祭壇炭火上的木柴上面。

en: but its entrails and its legs he shall wash with water. And the priest shall burn all of it on the altar, as a burnt offering, a food offering with a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 那人又要用水洗淨內臟和腿；祭司就把這一切全獻在祭壇上焚燒，作為燔祭，就是獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

en: "If his gift for a burnt offering is from the flock, from the sheep or goats, he shall bring a male without blemish,
zh: “人的供物若是獻羊作燔祭，不論是綿羊或是山羊，總要獻一隻沒有殘疾的公羊。

en: and he shall kill it on the north side of the altar before the LORD, and Aaron's sons the priests shall throw its blood against the sides of the altar.
zh: 他要在耶和華面前，在祭壇的北面，把羊宰殺；亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把羊血潑在祭壇的四周。

en: And he shall cut it into pieces, with its head and its fat, and the priest shall arrange them on the wood that is on the fire on the altar,
zh: 那人要把燔祭牲切成塊子；祭司就把肉塊、頭和脂肪，排列在祭壇炭火上的木柴上面；

en: but the entrails and the legs he shall wash with water. And the priest shall offer all of it and burn it on the altar; it is a burnt offering, a food offering with a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 那人又要用水洗淨內臟和腿，祭司就把這一切全獻在祭壇上焚燒，作為燔祭，就是獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

en: "If his offering to the LORD is a burnt offering of birds, then he shall bring his offering of turtledoves or pigeons.
zh: “人若是獻鳥類為燔祭作耶和華的供物，就要獻斑鳩或雛鴿。

en: And the priest shall bring it to the altar and wring off its head and burn it on the altar. Its blood shall be drained out on the side of the altar.
zh: 祭司要把鳥帶到祭壇那裡，扭下牠的頭來，焚燒在祭壇上；又把鳥血擠出來，流在祭壇的壁上；

en: He shall remove its crop with its contents and cast it beside the altar on the east side, in the place for ashes.
zh: 又要除掉鳥的嗉囊和髒物，丟在祭壇東邊，倒灰的地方。

en: He shall tear it open by its wings, but shall not sever it completely. And the priest shall burn it on the altar, on the wood that is on the fire. It is a burnt offering, a food offering with a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 然後要拿著兩個翅膀把鳥撕裂，只是不可撕斷。祭司要把牠放在祭壇，在炭火上的木柴上面焚燒，作為燔祭，就是獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。”
